easy.companyDescription: A specialized chip designer whose high-performance hardware serves enthusiasts and commercial computing buyers.
easy.macroContext: Cloud platforms and data-heavy workloads are increasing demand for specialized processing power.
easy.situation: Can a niche hardware category expand into larger commercial workloads without being overpriced as a cycle?
easy.longCase: New commercial workloads could expand demand beyond the original enthusiast market.
easy.shortCase: A cyclical chip market and volatile expectations make early growth easy to overprice.
setupHints: The company already holds a strong niche in performance-focused computing hardware.

medium.companyDescription: A semiconductor company focused on specialized high-performance processors.
medium.macroContext: Data centers are experimenting with more purpose-built hardware for heavy computing tasks.
medium.situation: Is specialized demand durable commercial adoption or a temporary spike?
medium.longCase: A niche hardware category may become useful for larger commercial workloads.
medium.shortCase: Chip cycles and competition can turn early demand into a temporary spike.

hard.macroContext: Computing demand is broadening as cloud infrastructure grows.
hard.situation: Will a specialized niche expand into larger markets, or will cycles and rivals cap the story?
hard.longCase: Specialized hardware suppliers may see their niche expand into larger computing markets.
hard.shortCase: Cyclical demand and fast-moving rivals make the valuation risky.

reveal.shortText: That was Nvidia. Demand for its specialized chips broadened well beyond the original enthusiast market, and the stock more than tripled.
reveal.funFact: Hardware once aimed mainly at enthusiasts became central to training modern machine-learning models.
whyItMoved: Commercial and data-center demand for specialized processors rose.
Investors re-rated the company's addressable market.
Performance leadership supported premium pricing for a period.

sources.label: Prototype sample seed
sources.notes: Placeholder sample content for Phase 3 pipeline; not production research.

review.reviewNotes: Prototype/sample seed for Phase 3 schema pipeline. Approximate prices and returns; not Gate 1/Gate 2 production content.

guesses.pointingFact: Jan 2015 semiconductor focused on specialized high-performance processors as data centers try purpose-built hardware

direction.cue: Specialized hardware may become useful for larger commercial workloads if demand is durable

guesses.pointingFact: Jan 2015 semiconductor with specialized niche as cloud infrastructure broadens computing demand
Semiconductor cyclical story where rivals and cycles can cap a specialized growth narrative
